title: Oldenburg cycling report labels v2
description: Structured silver or gold labels for citizen reports affecting cycling infrastructure in Oldenburg.

id.description: Stable report ID from the Stadtverbesserer source dataset.

is_cycling_related.description: True when the reported issue directly or materially affects bicycle riders, cycling infrastructure, or bicycle parking.

directness.description: How directly the issue affects cycling. Use direct for explicit cycling infrastructure or bike parking; indirect for general infrastructure that plausibly affects cyclists; nearby_only when proximity to a bike route is the only cycling signal; unrelated when no cycling impact is evident.

subcategory.description: Specific cycling-relevant issue type. Must be unrelated when is_cycling_related is false.

confidence.description: Model or reviewer confidence in the label.

needs_human_review.description: True for ambiguous reports, low-confidence labels, disagreements across classifiers, or cases where location/context is required.

reason_de.description: Short German explanation of the classification decision.
